overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning on a high-rise balcony overlooking a dense neon-lit futuristic cityscape at night, then moving through a luxurious cyberpunk apartment featuring red ambient lighting, holographic displays, and modern amenities.

agents.ego_description: standing on a high-rise balcony, slowly panning across the illuminated city skyline and neon billboards

entered.detail: transparent safety barrier with metal frame at the edge of the high-rise balcony
large illuminated advertisements and corporate signage on distant buildings
towering futuristic high-rise buildings with dense window lighting patterns
floating holographic advertisement above a distant building

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a high-rise balcony at night, overlooking a sprawling cyberpunk metropolis. The camera slowly pans across the skyline, revealing towering glass skyscrapers illuminated by countless windows and neon advertisements, with a glass railing visible in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop terrace transitioning to luxury apartment interior

events.description: moves from the outdoor terrace through the apartment entrance into the interior space

agents.ego_description: walking along the terrace past lounge furniture and entering the apartment through a sliding door

entered.detail: modern curved seating with illuminated base on the terrace
circular glass-top table with metallic frame
large tropical plants in planters along the terrace edge
sliding glass door leading into the apartment interior

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the rooftop terrace, passing modern outdoor furniture and potted plants, then transitions through a sliding glass door into the apartment interior, leaving the city view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment living area with red ambient lighting

events.description: enters a darker area illuminated by red neon accent lighting along the ceiling and walls

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit apartment interior, passing modern furniture and holographic displays

entered.detail: crimson LED strips running along ceiling edges and wall corners
large poster for the band Samurai with red and black artwork
contemporary curved sofa with dark upholstery
floating screen showing video content above the bed
low-profile bed with integrated lighting and textured bedding

segments.scene_description: Inside the apartment, the space is dominated by red neon accent lighting and dark wood paneling. The camera explores the living area, passing a Samurai band poster and modern furniture, then enters a bedroom featuring a large platform bed with holographic displays projected above it.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern bathroom with vertical garden and glass shower

events.description: enters the bathroom from the bedroom, revealing a glass shower and vanity area

agents.ego_description: entering the bathroom and examining the shower area and vanity fixtures

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling glass walls surrounding the shower area
living plant wall with dense greenery between the shower and vanity
long counter with integrated sink and modern fixtures
large rectangular mirror with backlighting above the sink
modern wall-mounted toilet with concealed tank

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a luxurious bathroom featuring a glass-enclosed shower, a vertical garden wall with lush greenery, and a modern vanity with integrated lighting. The space has dark marble flooring and maintains the apartment's high-end cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment entryway with weapon display and red carpet

events.description: moves from the bedroom area into the formal entryway with display cases

agents.ego_description: walking through the entryway, examining the weapon display case and approaching the apartment exit

entered.detail: long crimson carpet running the length of the entryway hall
illuminated wall case containing pistols and memorabilia
minimalist wooden seating against the wall
shadow box containing guitars and awards
heavy security door with electronic keypad lock

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the apartment's entryway, featuring a red carpet runner, a illuminated weapon display case with firearms and memorabilia, and a wooden bench. The camera approaches the secure exit door, passing framed guitar displays on the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a vast, neon-lit urban skyline into the intimate, high-end interior of a cyberpunk apartment. It begins on a high-rise balcony, panning across a sprawling metropolis of illuminated skyscrapers and glass railings before gliding past rooftop furniture and through a sliding glass door. As the camera enters the residence, the open city view is replaced by a moody atmosphere of red neon accents and dark wood, moving through a living area with a Samurai poster and into a bedroom featuring holographic displays above a platform bed. The journey continues into a luxurious bathroom characterized by dark marble floors and a lush vertical garden wall, before shifting toward the apartment's entryway. Finally, the camera passes an illuminated weapon display and framed guitars along a red carpet runner, coming to a stop at the secure exit door.
